CLAUDE.md - Development Guide for exametrika

Source: CLAUDE.md

Package Overview

exametrika is an R package for Test Data Engineering based on Shojima (2022, ISBN:978-9811699856). It provides psychometric analysis tools: CTT, IRT, GRM, LCA, LRA, Biclustering, BNM, LDLRA, LDB, BINET.

  • Current version: 1.13.1 (CRAN)
  • CRAN version: 1.13.1 (accepted 2026-05-18)
  • GitHub Release: v1.13.1 (2026-05-18, latest) / v1.13.0 (2026-05-17)
  • License: MIT
  • Website: https://kosugitti.github.io/exametrika/
  • Language: English (Japanese guide available as vignettes/guide-ja.Rmd)

Build & Test Commands

# Run all tests (requires devtools for Rcpp compilation)
Rscript -e 'devtools::test()'

# Run a single test file
Rscript -e 'devtools::load_all(); testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-irt.R")'

# R CMD check (full package check)
R CMD build . && R CMD check --as-cran exametrika_*.tar.gz

# Generate documentation from roxygen comments
Rscript -e 'roxygen2::roxygenise()'

README workflow

  • README.md is a generated artifact — do NOT edit it directly. It gets overwritten on the next build.
  • Edit README.Rmd, then run Rscript -e 'devtools::build_readme()', then commit BOTH README.Rmd and README.md together. pkgdown reads README.md as input, so it must be in sync with README.Rmd in every commit.
  • Default chunk option is eval = FALSE (set in the setup-readme chunk). README is a static showcase; no evaluated output is embedded. If a future chunk needs to actually run, override per-chunk with eval = TRUE and make sure preceding setup chunks (e.g. library(exametrika)) also run.
  • README.Rmd is listed in .Rbuildignore, so it is excluded from the CRAN tarball.
  • Background (2026-05-09, commit 9787904): the old README.md hand-wrote ```{r label, ...} chunk headers verbatim. pkgdown’s CommonMark renderer did not recognize {r ...} as a fence info string, so chunks collapsed into inline <code> and the install chunk’s leading # promoted to an <h1> “Install Exametrika”. The cc54ab3 blank-line fix was insufficient; converting to a real Rmd source resolved it.

Repository Structure

R/                   # R source files (46 files)
  00_*.R             # Utilities: plot, print, model fit, grid search, helpers
  00_IRM_Gibbs_CORE.R  # Shared Gibbs sampler core + helpers for IRM
  01_dataFormat.R    # Data input/formatting
  02_*.R             # Item/test statistics, inter-item analysis, correlations
  03_CTT.R           # Classical Test Theory
  04*.R              # IRT: base functions, ability estimation, parameter estimation
  05_LCA.R           # Latent Class Analysis
  06_LRA.R           # Latent Rank Analysis (binary)
  07_Biclustering.R  # Biclustering/Ranklustering (S3 generic)
  07_IRM.R           # Infinite Relational Model (S3 generic + binary method)
  08*.R              # Bayesian Network Models (BNM, GA, PBIL)
  09_LDLRA.R         # Local Dependence LRA
  10_LDB.R           # Local Dependence Biclustering
  11_BINET.R         # Bicluster Network Model
  12_LRA_ordinal.R   # LRA for ordinal data
  13_LRA_rated.R     # LRA for nominal/rated data
  14_grm.R           # Graded Response Model
  15_Biclustering_nominal.R
  16_Biclustering_ordinal.R
  17_Biclustering_nominal_IRM.R  # IRM for nominal data
  18_Biclustering_ordinal_IRM.R  # IRM for ordinal data
  19_Biclustering_rated.R        # Biclustering for rated data
src/                 # C++ source (Rcpp): GRM optimization, polychoric correlation
data/                # 11 sample datasets (.rda): J5S10, J5S1000, J12S5000, etc.
tests/testthat/      # 35 test files (~4,840 tests), Mathematica reference CSVs in fixtures/
  fixtures/mathematica_reference/  # 85 CSV files for cross-validation
man/                 # 99 .Rd files (auto-generated by roxygen2)
vignettes/           # 6 vignettes (Getting Started, IRT, LCA/LRA, Biclustering, BNM/LDLRA, Japanese guide)
docs/                # .gitignore'd (removed from repo); pkgdown site deployed to gh-pages branch via GitHub Actions

Coding Conventions

  • Naming: Public functions use PascalCase (e.g., ItemStatistics, GridSearch). Return value fields use snake_case (e.g., n_class, log_lik). Old PascalCase fields (Nclass, LogLik) are deprecated but retained for backward compatibility until v2.0.0.
  • S3 dispatch: Biclustering(), LRA(), and Biclustering_IRM() dispatch on data type (binary/ordinal/rated/nominal) via UseMethod(). Plot and print methods dispatch on exametrika class.
  • Model fit: All models return TestFitIndices as a 16-field ModelFit object via calcFitIndices() in 00_ModelFitModule.R.
  • Plotting: plot.exametrika() in 00_exametrikaPlot.R dispatches to model-family plot files (00_plot_*.R).
  • Progress output: Use message() (not cat()/print()) for progress messages, controlled by verbose parameter.
  • Rcpp: Performance-critical code in src/ (GRM gradient, polychoric correlation).
  • apply() caution: Never use apply(X, 2, FUN) when the result is used as a list. Use lapply(seq_len(ncol(X)), function(j) FUN(X[, j])) instead, because apply() returns a matrix (not a list) when all columns produce same-length results.

Testing

  • Framework: testthat (edition 3)
  • Reference data: Mathematica implementation outputs in tests/testthat/fixtures/mathematica_reference/ (85 CSV files) used for cross-validation
  • Test naming: test-<model>.R for model tests (e.g., test-irt.R, test-lca.R)
  • Test dependencies: Only testthat (no tidyverse/readxl — migrated to CSV/base-R in v1.10.0)
  • CI/CD: GitHub Actions — R-CMD-check.yaml (multi-platform), test-coverage.yaml (coverage report), pkgdown.yaml (site deployment to gh-pages), rhub.yaml (R-hub v2)
  • Build config: .Rbuildignore excludes develop/, docs/, .claude/, CLAUDE.md, tools/, .github/, etc. Tests and inst are NOT excluded (fixed in v1.10.0)
  • Current status: ~4,840 tests, all passing locally. On CRAN (Windows checktime limit), the slowest blocks in test-grm.R (J15S3810 GRM, nitems>=8 underflow regression) and test-irm.R (J35S515 Gibbs reproducibility) are wrapped in skip_on_cran() (added in v1.13.1).
  • R CMD check: 0 errors | 0 warnings | 0 notes

Known Technical Debt

TODO Items (tests/testthat/test-lra-ordinal.R)

  • L149: Investigate nobs handling unification — R uses per-item nobs (colSums(Z)) while Mathematica uses total nobs. Affects RMSEA, CAIC, BIC for datasets with significant missing data (e.g., J15S3810).
  • L171: Related test-level nobs handling for ordinal LRA.

Deprecated Functions (to be removed in v2.0.0)

  • IRM() → use Biclustering_IRM()
  • StrLearningGA_BNM() → use BNM_GA()
  • StrLearningPBIL_BNM() → use BNM_PBIL()
  • StrLearningPBIL_LDLRA() → use LDLRA_PBIL()

Deprecated Field Names (to be removed in v2.0.0)

  • Nclass → n_class
  • Nfield → n_field
  • Nrank → n_rank
  • N_Cycle → n_cycle
  • LogLik → log_lik

Future Work

  • BINET FRPIndex addition
  • Input data storage method unification (v2.0.0)
  • LRA.ordinal mixed category count support (requires matrix→list refactor)

Roadmap

v1.9.0 (released, GitHub Release 2026-02-23)

  • Polytomous Biclustering plots, Return value structure unification, pkgdown site migration, Vignettes, GridSearch/LRA/GRM bug fixes

v1.10.0/v1.10.1 (released, CRAN accepted 2026-03-20)

  • CAIC formula correction (Bozdogan 1987)
  • Confirmatory LCA/LRA (conf parameter for test equating)
  • SOM estimation refactoring (somclus())
  • dataFormat robustness improvements
  • Nominal IRM (Biclustering_IRM.nominal): Dirichlet-Multinomial collapsed Gibbs sampler
  • Ordinal IRM (Biclustering_IRM.ordinal): Shared Gibbs core + ordinal EM with cumulative normalization
  • Shared Gibbs core (R/00_IRM_Gibbs_CORE.R): Extracted collapsed Gibbs sampler + helpers
  • Test suite modernization (Excel→CSV, tidyverse dependency removal)

v1.10.2 (GitHub, 2026-03-24)

  • Nominal fit indices fix (benchmark removal → AIC/BIC/CAIC only)
  • Documentation fixes (J35S5000/J15S3810)
  • Empty field warning addition
  • Binary IRM variable name unification

v1.11.0 (CRAN, 2026-04-15)

  • Biclustering.rated — Calls Biclustering.nominal() internally + CA-based post-processing
    • No new EM code; estimation is identical to nominal
    • Post-processing: sort classes by correct rate BCRM[f, c, CA[j]] (ranklustering)
    • Two-layer output: Layer 1 = correct rate summary (TRP, MIC, SOAC/WOAC), Layer 2 = full category probs (distractor analysis)
  • Rated IRM — Calls Biclustering_IRM.nominal() internally + same post-processing
    • Design memo: develop/多値IRM設計メモ_20260221.md
    • Design confirmed: 2026-03-23
  • DistractorAnalysis (S3 generic, R/21_DistractorAnalysis.R)
  • J21S300 sample data (21 items × 300 examinees, 4-choice rated)

v1.12.0–v1.12.2 (GitHub only, never published to CRAN)

  • Vectorized EM, C++ IRM Gibbs (src/irm_gibbs_core.cpp, ~4x speedup)
  • conf_class parameter for class-side confirmatory Biclustering (binary/ordinal/nominal/rated)
  • Confirmatory Biclustering bug fixes (NCOL(U$Q) correction; matrix-form conf coercion)
  • v1.12.1 EM stabilization hotfix
  • v1.12.2 dataFormat(rated, CA) CA-unobserved warning (was stop)
  • Phase 3 polytomous biclustering sim ran 243/243 complete (2026-05-03)

v1.13.0 (CRAN, submitted 2026-05-17; auto-check rejected for Windows checktime)

  • Graphical Lasso (Glasso, R/22_GlassoUnit.R): polychoric → BCD + EBIC (Foygel-Drton 2010) + warm start
  • Chatterjee’s xi family (chatterjee_xi, xi_stable, chatterjee_matrix, R/23_Chatterjee.R)
  • print.exametrika Glasso branch
  • Rolls up all v1.12.x changes (CRAN never saw 1.12.x)
  • GitHub Release v1.13.0 (latest), Discussions #26 (JP) / #27 (EN)

v1.13.1 (CRAN, accepted 2026-05-18)

  • Resubmission of 1.13.0 after CRAN auto-check rejected on a single NOTE: Overall checktime 11 min > 10 min on r-devel-windows-x86_64
  • No user-visible changes. Only test-suite gating:
    • test-grm.R: J15S3810 GRM (~60s) and nitems>=8 underflow regression (~8s) skip on CRAN
    • test-irm.R: J35S515 Gibbs shared fixture (~23s) and two reproducibility tests (~22s) skip on CRAN
    • All tests continue to run locally and on R-hub / win-devel (the NOT_CRAN env var set by testthat)
  • Lesson: heavy real-data fit tests (JS style regressions) must be wrapped in skip_on_cran() from now on. See “Test suite slimming” item under “Known Technical Debt” / .claude/CLAUDE.md 優先度：高.

v2.0.0 (breaking changes, in design)

  • Polytomous BNM (StepReg / StepBNM, case C) — DAG-given fit only; structure learning deferred to v2.1+.
    • Case C: P(Y ≤ q | X = x) = Φ(τ_q − μ_x) with monotone μ_1 ≤ ... ≤ μ_Q
    • β_caseC = bsp_moX × D (where D = number of category gaps), matches brms mo() (Bürkner-Charpentier 2020)
    • Additive parents only (interactions out of scope for v2.0.0)
    • Model fit indices M_0/M_t/M_s with AIC/BIC/CAIC/NFI/CFI/RMSEA
    • “ξ map” + “StepReg/StepBNM” naming established 2026-05-12/13
    • Validated on お遍路さん dataset (2026-05-09): DAG full reversal ΔAIC = +17 (clearer than J15S3810 ΔAIC = ±5)
  • Structure learning (Glasso skeleton → ξ direction → case C fit) is deferred to v2.1+
  • Remove deprecated functions and field names (IRM(), StrLearningGA_BNM(), Nclass, Nfield, etc.)
  • Drop backward-compatible aliases
  • Downstream packages (ggExametrika, shinyExametrika) must complete snake_case migration first
  • CRAN cadence note: per feedback_cran_submit_cadence.md, allow ≥1 month from v1.13.1 acceptance (2026-05-18) before submitting v2.0.0 — target 2026-06-18 or later.

Long-term

  1. Resolve nobs handling discrepancy (TODO items above)
  2. Additional C++ acceleration for EM-based models
  3. Support for multidimensional IRT models

On this page

Developed by Koji Kosugi.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
